creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
Hi,
 
 On Thu, 3 Jun 2010, Philip M. Gollucci wrote:
 
 >> Synopsis:	[PATCH] graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool: update to 8.20
 
 Thanks for this submission, however, as stated by the Makefile,
 
 # Note: This port tracks the "production release" of ExifTool as given
 # by http://www.sno.phy.queensu.ca/~phil/exiftool/history.html
 #
 # Please make sure you are updating to the latest production release
 # before updating the version of this port.
 
 8.20 is not designated as a production release so I have not updated the 
 port.
 
 If you have urgent need of features in 8.20, I would suggest creating a 
 new graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool-devel port to cover intermediate 
 development releases.
 
 Regards,
 -- 
 Tod McQuillin
